prompt_en: When driving in Japan, you must carry your driver's license at all times.
explanation_en: License possession is required while operating a vehicle.
raw_text: When driving in Japan, you must carry your driver's license at all times.

prompt_en: Drivers must signal before changing lanes on any road.
explanation_en: Signaling is required for all lane changes.
raw_text: Drivers must signal before changing lanes on any road.

prompt_en: Pedestrians have the right of way at marked crosswalks.
explanation_en: Pedestrian priority at crosswalks is a fundamental rule.
raw_text: Pedestrians have the right of way at marked crosswalks.

prompt_en: You must come to a complete stop at all railroad crossings.
explanation_en: Railroad crossings require a complete stop.
raw_text: You must come to a complete stop at all railroad crossings.

prompt_en: The following distance should be at least 2 seconds under normal conditions.
explanation_en: The 2-second rule provides adequate reaction time.
raw_text: The following distance should be at least 2 seconds under normal conditions.

prompt_en: Drivers must yield to emergency vehicles with active sirens and lights.
explanation_en: Emergency vehicles have priority on the road.
raw_text: Drivers must yield to emergency vehicles with active sirens and lights.

prompt_en: Overtaking is prohibited on solid white lines.
explanation_en: Solid white lines indicate no overtaking.
raw_text: Overtaking is prohibited on solid white lines.

prompt_en: Drivers must check blind spots before every lane change.
explanation_en: Blind spot checks are essential for safe lane changes.
raw_text: Drivers must check blind spots before every lane change.

prompt_en: Reduce speed when driving in rain to prevent hydroplaning.
explanation_en: Reduced speed in rain improves traction.
raw_text: Reduce speed when driving in rain to prevent hydroplaning.

prompt_en: Drivers must remain at the scene of an accident and call the police.
explanation_en: Leaving an accident scene is a hit-and-run offense.
raw_text: Drivers must remain at the scene of an accident.
